title: Verified GitHub remote server is UNKNOWN (uninspectable by construction)

origin.description: Public documentation config from github/github-mcp-server (README.md (Remote MCP, VS Code)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: Even a first-party, allowlisted remote endpoint cannot be inspected statically — the scanner can see where it points but not what tools it will expose — so the honest verdict is UNKNOWN, with no risk finding because the host is verified.
knownLimitations: The host api.githubcopilot.com is allowlisted, so no supply.unknown-remote finding is emitted; the UNKNOWN comes from remote-by-construction, not from an untrusted host.
